title: NotificationSentEvent
description: Published by Notification Service after each fan-out attempt to a follower. Consumed by Analytics Service to record notification delivery metrics. Delivery guarantee: best-effort (no idempotency dedup required on consumer side).

event_id.description: Unique event identifier (UUID v4). Note: this topic is best-effort — no idempotency dedup is enforced on the Analytics consumer for this event.

version.description: Schema version. Always 'v1' for this schema.

timestamp.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp of when the notification fan-out attempt was made (e.g. 2026-04-15T10:05:03.551Z).

correlation_id.description: Distributed tracing ID — same correlation_id as the originating NewReleaseEvent that triggered this fan-out.

notification_id.description: MongoDB ObjectId (_id) of the notification document inserted into the notifications collection. Used by Analytics to reference the source document.

recipient_user_id.description: UUID of the user who received (or failed to receive) the notification. Anonymized — no PII.

notification_type.description: Type of notification. 'NEW_RELEASE' for artist upload fan-out. 'SYSTEM' for platform announcements (reserved for future use).

artist_id.description: UUID of the artist who triggered the notification. Populated for NEW_RELEASE type. Null for SYSTEM type.

song_id.description: UUID of the song associated with the notification. Populated for NEW_RELEASE type. Null for SYSTEM type.

delivery_status.description: Result of this fan-out attempt. 'DELIVERED' = notification document inserted successfully. 'FAILED' = all 3 retries exhausted, moved to DLQ. 'PENDING' = intermediate state during retry (should not appear in final event).

retry_count.description: Number of retry attempts made before this event was published. 0 = first attempt succeeded. 3 = all retries exhausted (typically accompanies FAILED status).

channel.description: Delivery channel used. Phase 1 only supports 'IN_APP'. Push/email channels are out of scope.
